name: John Deere Financial, F.S.B.
description_short: John Deere Financial provides equipment financing for agricultural, construction, and lawn care equipment purchases through dealer networks.
description_long: John Deere Financial, F.S.B. is the captive finance subsidiary of Deere & Company, one of the world's largest manufacturers of agricultural and construction equipment. The company has operated for decades as the primary financing arm for John Deere equipment purchases across North America. John Deere Financial specializes in installment credit for equipment acquisitions rather than traditional business loans or lines of credit. The company offers promotional financing programs directly through authorized John Deere dealers, making equipment financing accessible to farmers, contractors, landscapers, and property owners. Their financing extends across the full product portfolio including tractors, compact equipment, lawn mowers, utility vehicles, and construction machinery. John Deere Financial's primary distinction is its exclusive partnership with Deere equipment—customers cannot use their financing for non-John Deere purchases, and the company operates entirely through dealer channels rather than direct consumer applications. The financing programs are dealer-dependent, meaning availability, terms, and rates vary by location and dealer participation. Current promotions include 0% APR financing for 60 months on select compact tractors with approximately 10% average down payment required. The company's underwriting appears conservative, as promotions explicitly exclude government agencies, company direct sales, and individuals in rental business programs. Honest assessment: John Deere Financial is best suited for equipment buyers committed to the John Deere brand with established dealer relationships; it is not a flexible financing option for businesses needing capital for general operations or non-equipment purchases.
services: Installment credit financing for new John Deere equipment
Promotional 0% APR financing on select compact tractors
Equipment financing through authorized dealer network
Financing for tractors, mowers, and utility vehicles
Financing for construction equipment including excavators
pros: Promotional 0% APR financing available for up to 60 months on qualifying equipment
Specialized expertise in agricultural and construction equipment financing with decades of experience
Seamless integration with John Deere dealerships for point-of-sale financing
Financing available on full product range from compact tractors to high-horsepower machinery
Flexible down payment structures with average 10% down on promotional offers
No need to shop multiple lenders—financing available directly at dealer
cons: Financing only available for John Deere equipment; cannot be used for other brands or general business needs
Availability depends entirely on dealer participation—not all dealers or regions may offer all promotions
Strict eligibility exclusions eliminate government buyers and rental businesses from promotional rates
Down payment typically required (average 10%), reducing accessibility for capital-constrained operations
Rates and terms vary significantly by dealer and location, creating inconsistent pricing
best_for: Farmers and agricultural operators purchasing new John Deere tractors and equipment
Landscaping and lawn care businesses upgrading mowers and compact equipment
Construction contractors needing equipment financing through established Deere dealers
Property owners tackling seasonal projects with promotional 0% APR financing availability
diagnosis: John Deere Financial is best for equipment buyers with existing relationships to John Deere dealers who are purchasing qualifying equipment and can meet down payment requirements. The primary caveat is that this is captive financing exclusive to John Deere products with rates and availability entirely dependent on dealer participation, making it inflexible for businesses needing capital for non-equipment purposes or competing equipment brands.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
